review_title: Robust conversational AI platform that help us build advance virtual agents without coding
description: Boost.ai helped us (Wize AI) support the Baltic languages (Estonian, Latvian, Lithuanian, Russian) when almost no international companies wanted to do it, for conversational AI solutions.
author: Marcos Daniel M.
pros: The platform is easy to master as the e-learning material is well developed and easy to digest. All the existing features offer us the capability to govern the virtual agents and control what happen during the conversations with citizens and customers. There is no black box. I also appreciate a lot the number of reports and analytics boost.ai has. I can see that our customers are taking advantage of the self-learning features (the platform suggests what intents we should add and even training data we can use) and integration with existing human chat solutions.
cons: Even though boost.ai platform offers many pre-made virtual agents or modules (for banks, insurance, telco, municipalities, COVID-19 crisis, HR) I believe that customers will benefit even more if there are more pre made agents (some for specific roles) available.

description: Boost.ai help reduce the traffic to the expensive contact centres by giving customers access to an intelligent chatbot. Boost.ai are easy to work with and provide value within three months.
author: Soren N.
pros: This product is very easy to set-up and easy to learn for our employees. It has a great business case and the AI is truly amazing.
cons: If I have to say something negative then it is a lack of communication with regards to the product road-map.

description: Positive overall experience. Great team, with very responsive PMs and partner resources.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Pre-built modules within the sectors it was needed. Clean interface with easy to access tutorials.
cons: Too early to say. The collaboration is still in it's early stages, but so far there isn't anything which stands out as a deficiency.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have currently implementing for two cases and a third is soon coming up. Impressed by the results obtained from only a limited amount of training rounds with the software.
author: Michael F.
pros: The ease of use Particularly great on Nordic languages The user interphase The quality Assurance during the training sessions
cons: It would be great to have a multi tenant user interphase making more developers working simultaneously.

author: Laura S.
pros: The product is very easy to implement and provides consistent responses. It frees up capacity to allow for more difficult queries to be answered by a person. I truly believe in using AI within the workplace and this has been a good addition.
cons: At times, Boost.ai did not detect the right type of query which meant that it left some people frustrated. It has got a lot better. I wish it would remember the style of writing, e.g. more formal, between instruction.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: We are very pleased with it, probably one of the best(if not the best) conversational AI's out there
author: Sigurdur A.
pros: Ease of use is probably its greatest strength. We were able to train a group of our own people as AI trainers in merely a few weeks. None of them had any previous experience or education regarding AI or computer schience. The learning material is very comprehensive and consise. The user interface is very well designed. Everything is very fluid. No waiting or loading times when implementing new material. It just feels very smooth. It is hard not to love it. It took a remarkably short time to build a conversational AI that was helpful for our customers. And we are mostly self sufficient in adding additional material. Employees that used to answer questions from customers by phone and e-mail are now spending their days training the AI. We have some ideas for improvements. Little things that could improve the user interface and speed up work for the AI trainers even further. Boost have a forum where we can make our ideas known and other users can upvote ideas that they would like implemented. The ideas that get the most upvotes are implemented in the next patch. It is a great system.
cons: There is nothing we don't like about it. Nothing at all. None of our employees who use it has ever spoken a bad word about the software. Note that this is very unusual. We implement a lot of new software and there is always something that gets on your nerves. People always have something to complain about. Not so with the Boost AI. Anyone who has ever used it, loves it.

description: Typical projects we help our clients with where the boost.ai technology plays a key role: - Reduce costs - Increase customer satisfaction - Increase self-service - Remove friction in the user experience - Faster response time - Free up time in the organization to work more value-adding - Become a more data-driven organization - Creating increased digital maturity in the organization - Profitable growth - Become compliant with legislations
author: Bjørn B.
pros: - First of all very strong NLP & NLU capabilities - Scalable in large and complex organisations - User friendly and easy to use API connectors - Automatic Semantic Understanding (ASU)
cons: There is the potential to further develop methods to measure the end-user's satisfaction. It would been nice to have if you could more easily connect this feedback to third-party systems.

review_title: Easy to use with good results
description: We use their chatbots to aid our customer service, serving both customers and our agents. It has reduced the need of human interactions and reduced average length of conversations.
author: Aiste H.
pros: it is very user-friendly and easy to work with after a short introduction. The results are consistently good and predictable. This makes planning the work much easier for us. It is a great chatbot platform, one of the bets ones I have personally seen.
cons: When we started working with them, the product was still rather young. They evolve constantly, but there are still always some features in the backlog that would e extremely useful for us. I think it will be a much more mature product very soon and I look very much forward to it. Despite everything, the company is flexible and willing to provide workarounds whenever possible.

author: Elisabeth N.
pros: I like that it's easy to use, and the tool for searching conversations with many different things to filter on. I like that our AI supervisor suggest things and functions that could be of use to us.
cons: I wish it was easier to filter on coneversation ID. I wish it was possible to see which browser the chatbot was used on, and wich operating system. Could have more courses

author: Egild H.
pros: A chatbot is only as good as you make it and Boost has enabled business to do exactly that. The tech is top tier and the tools make it really easy for business to train and maintain the bot.
cons: Analytics is the most challenging thing about this. Both in measuring customer satisfaction and also if the customer also actually did get the help they needed (First contact resolution)

author: Kjell Olav H.
pros: Boost.ai's Conversational AI platform is a joy to work with. It's equipped with all the necessary enterprise features, easy to use (without coding) and extremely scalable due to world class NLU. It's easy to integrate with other systems and customer channels, enabling customers to develop transactional Virtual Assistants.
cons: There's nothing special that comes to mind.

review_title: I strongly recommend to become boost.ai business partner
author: Mariví M.
pros: This software has many tools for AI trainers, I can understand how it works with AI predictions, It has great analytics tools and strong model training features. I can manage the entire process of the virtual agent implementation.It is very easy to use, it can be connected to other software through APIs.The company has good learning materials, same as marketing, webinars, news, etc.
cons: I'm looking forward for more languages to be supported. I would like to see more features for building voice agents.

description: 24/7 availability Scalable customer service - especially during Corona crsis Deep integrations to back-end systems allow for personalization of services
author: Marc H.
pros: By far out-classes competitive NLP/NLU models, especially in the Nordic languages. High focus on Research and product development in close sparring with partners and customers.
cons: Certain aspects of enterprise readiness is still in development, or only recently implemented.

description: Easy to use. Great help from support staff.
author: Åge L.
pros: The ease of functionality. Undoubtedly the best AI on the current marked. The ease of use. This is a very flexible solution. It has endless configuration possibilities. Adore how scaleable it is. You add users and the service it offers does not decrease. The service of the support team is above what I expected. Thank you.
cons: Nothing at all Can not think of anything

review_title: The best conversational AI on the market
description: More efficient customer service with higher service level and better customer engagement and experience.
author: Markus M.
pros: The best NLP capabilities of the chatbot solutions on the market and easy to develop and implement.
cons: The solution could be more configurable for the admins/developers and the pricing is also reflecting the quality of the solution.

description: Great tool to automate customer service
author: Jari A.
pros: Superior NLP performance, easy to train AI, highly packaged and easy to use, easy to integrate to back-end.
cons: Could be easier to expand/hook to complementary products, could have more open API's to access and modify data.

description: Boost.ai complements our business so we have the right tools to face the future
author: Robert G.
pros: VCA still requires a lot of manual input to work, but boost.ai has succeeded in making programming simple and intuitive. In addition to smart technology, boost.ai focuses on talented employees who have the ability to motivate and teach customers and partners. Such an engagement infects all of us who work indirectly with boost.ai
cons: The technology is still expensive to use for smaller companies, but here the development is fast.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: My overall experience of Boost.AI is great, it's simply good software.
author: Jelle D.
pros: We've used multiple AI chat software products, I noticed that Boost.AI works simply really well. Every AI chat bot requires some setup but this was really easy with Boost.AI. I think this is due to the neutral language processing. Something else I liked about Boost.AI is that is was also easy for our team to learn using the software.
cons: I can't think of anything that I disliked about Boost.AI. If I had to say something, then I'd say to support more languages.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: In overall this is the best chatbot platform vendor so far that I have been using. Would recommend to anyone, who would like to create not only Q/A chatbot, but also implement integrations towards customer's core systems.
author: Marko L.
pros: -Very good NLP understanding -Very easy to use and create conversational flows by the AI Trainers -Boost.AI has a good ambition to gather feedback from customers and develop their product even better -Regularly coming new features / addons
cons: -Doesn't have all the features which we want to have yet
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: very good working relationship and our contact from Boost.ai is always on hand
author: Auðunn S.
pros: We set it up really fast and got great user interaction almost immediately. The process to make it deeper and more impactful since initial set up has also been very enjoyable and successful.
cons: the synonym list could be more responsive and the search bar should always be on top.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Sondre H.
pros: Easy to use and new material is quickly trained i det model.

description: The partner team is extremely responsive, pragmatic and fun to work with.
author: Kiran C.
pros: User friendly - workflows and configuration Time to market Underlying algorithms the reduce training need innovation like cold start and ocr
cons: Improvement opportunities multi language support ( blocker in some cases) voice support, messenger integration ( compared to competition claims) cheat sheet comparing to competition and ROI templates Roadmap with approx timelines
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jacob F.
pros: Easy to create good customer experience with the tool
cons: Better overview of intents when the bot gets huge
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
